body_transformation: The slender bipedal form retains its elongated silhouette with rounded head and pointed ears, now rendered in deep violet translucent skin revealing swirling internal energy currents beneath. The long flowing tail dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing faint crimson mist, while the original light gray and purple coloration shifts to layered ebony black and pale silver with ghostly white highlights. Glowing purple psychic energy is replaced by hollow eye sockets filled with swirling mist, and the skin texture becomes smooth yet semi-opaque like thin smoke. Subtle energy ripples distort the air around the body, maintaining the original proportions but appearing partially dissolved into thin air.
signature_feature: Hollow eye sockets: swirling crimson mist within deep violet hollows, with ghostly white energy ripples.
